allow: PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 8720 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "PID 8720: CPU=$\([math]::Round\($p.CPU,1\)\)s WS=$\([math]::Round\($p.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)\)MB Started=$\($p.StartTime\) Elapsed=$\([math]::Round\(\(\(Get-Date\) - $p.StartTime\).TotalMinutes,1\)\)min" } else { "PID 8720 not running" })
